tasks.description: Build a short operational supply route into a primary industry.
tasks.prompt: Prefer the shortest candidate that can become an operational route. Complete one Engineering Supplies delivery route if available.

tasks.description: Connect a raw material producer to its first processor.
tasks.prompt: Build a coal route to the steel mill, then wait for route progress.

tasks.description: Maximize delivered cargo value, network profit, and milestones over the step budget.
tasks.prompt: Build the highest-value logistics network possible. Prefer short operational routes first, then expand to higher-value cargo chains.
